Example: The storm began to abate after several hours of heavy rain.

Phrases: A building where animals are butchered
Example: The city council debated whether to relocate the abattoir away from residential areas.
The abbot led the monks in their morning prayers.

Phrases: A shortened form of a word or phrase
Example: NASA is an abbreviation for National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
King Edward VIII chose to abdicate the throne to marry the woman he loved.

Phrases: An act of abdicating or renouncing the throne
Example: His abdication shocked the nation and sent the royal family into turmoil.

Phrases: Forcing someone to go somewhere with you, often using threats or violence
Example: The abduction of the diplomat triggered an international crisis.
The scientist noted that the unusual result was an aberration in an otherwise consistent experiment.

Phrases: Formally put an end to a system
Example: Many activists campaigned to abolish the unjust law.

Phrases: The original inhabitants of a country
Example: The aborigines of Australia have preserved their traditions for thousands of years.

Phrases: To shorten a piece of writing without losing the sense
Example: The publisher asked the author to abridge the manuscript from 600 pages to 300.
It is absurd to claim that the earth is only a few thousand years old.
